name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, CMS studio workflows, satellite app UX, native E2E auth debugging, scoped commits, CLI support, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Tuturuuu platform work aligned with repo conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, CMS and branded content studio guidance, standalone satellite app UX, native-machine local E2E auth debugging, apps/web release badge metadata and version bump guidance, dedicated shared-worktree agent coordination with archived context support and completed-note archiving, scoped Conventional Commit follow-through, native ttr CLI install and SDK-backed workflows, focused ttr task workflows, finance CRUD, finance read diagnostics, pagination commands, wrapped finance response normalization, ttr-first task capture, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, review-comment follow-through, plugin validation, and incremental tooling improvements.
defaultPrompt: Revamp this platform CMS landing-page editor for non-technical content updates.
Upgrade this satellite app UX with workspace navigation and app-session auth.
Fix this Flutter task-board or native local E2E auth behavior and verify it.
Fix this platform release badge metadata and run the checks it needs.
Check finance reads with the ttr CLI and fix the SDK helper if needed.
Add this as a Tuturuuu task with the ttr CLI.
Update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Coordinate this shared worktree task, update docs or review comments, and commit by scope for future agents.
